changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Test Execution and Raw Data Capture page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Collect machine outputs and validate results. Record execution confirmation (run completed Yes/No, run issues if any). Upload or enter raw data files and machine-generated results. Capture run metadata (run ID, kit lot number, operator). Perform post-test quality control (QC pass/fail) and decide if repeat test is needed. System stores raw data securely and updates sample status.

column.name: content
column.value: {"pageDescription":"Test Execution and Raw Data Capture","dataPoints":{"executionConfirmation":{"runCompleted":{"type":"boolean","label":"Run Completed","options":["Yes","No"],"required":true},"runIssues":{"type":"text","label":"Run Issues","multiline":true,"conditionalOn":"runCompleted == No","required":false}},"rawData":{"fileUpload":{"type":"file","label":"Raw Data File","accept":".csv,.xlsx,.txt,.xml","required":false},"machineData":{"type":"text","label":"Machine-Generated Data","multiline":true,"required":false},"runId":{"type":"text","label":"Run ID","required":false},"kitLot":{"type":"text","label":"Kit Lot Number","required":false},"operator":{"type":"text","label":"Operator","required":false}},"postTestQC":{"qcResult":{"type":"choice","label":"Post-Test QC Result","options":["Pass","Fail"],"required":true},"repeatTest":{"type":"boolean","label":"Repeat Test Required","conditionalOn":"qcResult == Fail","required":false},"qcNotes":{"type":"text","label":"QC Notes","multiline":true,"required":false}}},"systemActions":["Store raw data securely","Update sample status","Link results to sample record"],"bulkOperations":{"enabled":true,"applyToSelected":["runCompleted","runId","kitLot","operator","qcResult"]},"nextPage":"Result Interpretation and Analysis"}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Test Execution and Raw Data Capture workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Collect machine outputs and validate results through post-test quality control

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Record execution confirmation (run completed Yes/No, issues). Upload raw data files or enter machine-generated data. Capture run metadata (run ID, kit lot, operator). Perform post-test QC (pass/fail) and decide on repeat testing if needed.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Test Execution and Raw Data Capture - Machine output collection and validation
